title: spergularia rupestris
intro: Spergularia rupestris, also known as rock sandwort, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Spergularia rupestris include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and stems can be used in herbal preparations, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
